summary: Deliverable is incomplete and non-functional. Missing critical files: package.json, unit test files (parser.test.ts, aggregator.test.ts, markdown.test.ts), test fixtures (junit-run1/2.xml, results-run1/2.json), tsconfig.json. Workflow references unpinned action oven-sh/setup-bun@v2 (violates SHA pinning requirement). YAML parser imports js-yaml without declaring dependency. act-test.ts cannot run standalone (references missing test files). Core logic (types, parser, aggregator, markdown) is sound, but nothing executes. Regex-based XML parsing in parser.ts is fragile. act-test.ts conflates unit testing with integration testing across too many concerns.
